notes: Only the dessert menu was captured; lunch/dinner, happy hour, kids, and beverage menus were not included in the raw text. No beverages present in this extract.

dishes.name: Brookie Betty Boop
dishes.description: Chocolate brownie mixed together with chocolate chip cookie, baked and served warm with Lopez Island Creamery vanilla ice cream

dishes.name: Carefully Selected Local Ice Cream
dishes.description: Made by local favorite - Lopez Island Creamery

dishes.name: Enticingly Refreshing Sorbet
dishes.description: By Lopez Island Creamery, ask your server for today's selections

dishes.name: Mouthwatering Marionberry Pie
dishes.description: Cute little pie with wild Woodland, WA marionberries, served warm, with 2 scoops of local favorite Lopez Island Creamery vanilla ice cream

dishes.name: Peerless Pier Pie
dishes.description: From the Pier Restaurant in Newport, Rhode Island, birthplace of Duke himself. Lopez Island Creamery chocolate and espresso ice cream layered in a cookie crust with all natural chocolate sauce, homemade whipped cream and topped with toasted almonds

dishes.name: What's Up Duke?!? Carrot Cake
dishes.description: Dense, moist and tasty with a delicious sweetness of our yummy cream cheese frosting and a tangy raspberry coulis
